name: Redland City Council Community Support Grant
status: Future round - Round 1 opens 27 July 2026 and closes 16 August 2026
best_for: Up to $20,000 for Redland City community projects with social, cultural, recreational or environmental outcomes. Requires not-for-profit eligibility, Redland location, insurance, quotes and reporting capacity.

name: Redland City Council Grants and Sponsorship
status: Council portal - current programs and round links
best_for: Council grant programs, awarded grants, workshops, local funding finder links and program-specific pages including Community Support, RADF, events and rapid response pathways.

name: Australian Government Health, Disability and Ageing grants and tenders
status: Program information - public grants listed through GrantConnect
best_for: Health, disability and aged-care grants and tenders; use for Yulu-Burri-Ba, Moopi, health, disability, aged-care and service-delivery scans, then confirm on GrantConnect or Community Grants Hub.

name: business.gov.au Grants and Programs Finder
status: Search portal - filters open, coming soon and closed programs
best_for: Business support, Indigenous business, digital, disaster, environmental, equipment, events and training filters for Queensland businesses, sole traders and not-for-profits.

name: Community Grants Hub
status: Open listings page - current rounds visible
best_for: Current Australian Government administered grant rounds, including drought, multicultural infrastructure, commemorative, business transition and other open competitive opportunities.

name: GrantConnect
status: Authoritative federal portal - JavaScript/manual check required
best_for: Authoritative Australian Government grants source. Use Community Grants Hub and department pages for accessible summaries, then confirm final details on GrantConnect before drafting.

name: Modernised Multicultural Grants Program: Infrastructure for Multicultural Communities
status: Open - Batch 2 closes 4:00pm AEDT 12 November 2026
best_for: Not-for-profit multicultural infrastructure projects: community hubs, art spaces, amenities, meeting spaces, stages, sporting and physical activity spaces. Requires co-contribution and landowner or ownership evidence.

name: First Nations Clean Energy Advice Grants Round 1
status: Open - closes 5:00pm AEST 3 September 2026, or earlier if funding is allocated
best_for: First Nations organisations and groups seeking $5,000 to $80,000 for technical advice, planning, skills and informed decision-making around clean energy opportunities.

name: First Nations Digital Support Hub Program
status: Open - full applications due 5:00pm AEST 30 June 2026
best_for: Large First Nations digital inclusion support, online safety, connectivity literacy, resources and telephone/email support. Likely partnership or lead-provider fit rather than a small local grant.

name: Indigenous.gov.au Grants
status: Program list
best_for: Country and environment, economic development, employment, health, local investment and GrantConnect-linked First Nations opportunities.

name: Network of Digital Mentors Program
status: Open - full applications due 5:00pm AEST 30 June 2026
best_for: Training digital mentors in participating First Nations communities; possible alignment with local digital capability, noticeboard and community media concepts if authority and eligibility are real.

name: PBC Capacity Building Grant Opportunity
status: Open - closes 30 June 2026
best_for: Native title holding corporations and Prescribed Bodies Corporate building organisational capacity and economic benefit from land. Check applicant status and invitation/eligibility detail before drafting.

name: Queensland First Nations Grants and Funding
status: Program list
best_for: Queensland First Nations grants including NAIDOC, languages, reconciliation, wellbeing, business, housing, arts, sport, Looking after Country and health pathways.

name: Queensland First Nations housing support
status: Support information
best_for: Housing support entry points: renting, buying, public and community housing, remote community housing, emergency accommodation and aged-care housing context.

name: UNOPS Small Grants
status: Global program information
best_for: Global small grants and programme support around environment, climate, Indigenous peoples, human rights, women?s empowerment and sustainable livelihoods. Treat as partnership development, not a quick local application.

name: Island sponsorship and partner support watchlist
status: Local support list to build
best_for: Local sponsorship, in-kind support, venue support, media partnerships, market stalls, public notices, letters of support and business partnerships.

name: Arts Queensland Funding
status: Program list
best_for: Arts funding for individuals and organisations. Use this as the arts entry point, then check individual program pages for open dates.

name: Gambling Community Benefit Fund
status: Round 126 closed; next round date still not announced
best_for: One-off not-for-profit community projects in Queensland. Round 126 is closed, a new online grants system is being introduced, and the next round date is still being finalised.

name: Queensland disaster grants and financial assistance
status: Support information - activated disaster support, not normal project funding
best_for: Emergency hardship, essential services, household contents, structural assistance and disaster support routing after activated events. Good for noticeboard triage, not ordinary project grant writing.

name: Queensland Grants Finder
status: Search portal
best_for: Queensland Government grants across business, community, sport, events, arts, environment and regional development. Use as a broad scan, then confirm on the program page.

name: Queensland Reconstruction Authority resilience funding programs
status: Current resilience funding programs listed
best_for: Disaster resilience and risk reduction, including QRRRP, DRFA efficiencies, Protecting Our Communities, North Queensland resilience, DRF and other recovery/resilience programs.

name: Queensland Sport and Recreation Funding
status: Program list - multiple sport and recovery streams
best_for: Active Clubs, First Nations sport and recreation, grassroots infrastructure, inclusive facilities, recovery and active industry programs. Check each listed program before promising a round.
